prompt.content: You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested tasks using the available tools. Do not ask clarifying questions - use the information provided and make reasonable assumptions when needed.

Prepare the closing journal entries for January. Transfer all revenue and expense account balances to the Income Summary account, then close Income Summary to Retained Earnings. Follow our closing procedures. Email the closing entries to controller@company.example.com.  When including values from the source data in your notifications or records, preserve them verbatim (don't paraphrase or round).

messages.subject: Monthly Closing Procedures
messages.body_plain:
Closing entry rules:

1. Debit all revenue accounts to zero (transfer to Income Summary)
2. Credit all expense accounts to zero (transfer to Income Summary)
3. Calculate net income (Revenue - Expenses)
4. Close Income Summary to Retained Earnings
5. Accounts with zero balance: exclude from closing entries
6. Report the net income for the period

- Controller

cells.Notes: Do not close - this is a balance sheet account
